0.0212*sin(0.3772*(0.0507 - x_2)**2 + 0.6691*(0.3834 - x_3)**2 + 0.2174*sin(1.6811*x_1 - 5.254) - 0.5732*sinh(0.8031 - 1.5329*x_4) + 1.5864) - 0.1267

0.1337*sin(0.208*(0.0507 - x_2)**2 + 0.3689*(0.3834 - x_3)**2 + 0.1198*sin(1.6811*x_1 - 5.254) - 0.316*sinh(0.8031 - 1.5329*x_4) - 1.656) + 0.1994

0.299*tanh(0.1626*(0.0507 - x_2)**2 + 0.2883*(0.3834 - x_3)**2 + 0.0937*sin(1.6811*x_1 - 5.254) - 0.247*sinh(0.8031 - 1.5329*x_4) - 1.7447) + 0.5792
